empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.subtitle: Pick a frame and design it to add it here.

note.title: Note for image optimization
note.body: Image optimization is activated for one or more of your photos. If you did not intend to utilize this feature, you can deactivate it from the editor.

summary.title: Purchase Summary
summary.pricingPolicy: Pricing policy: The full list price is a price at which we have offered the product for sale; however, we may not have sold the item at that price.

checkoutModal.title: Checkout details
checkoutModal.subtitle: Tell us where to send your order.

checkoutPage.inquiryNote: This size is outside the frame's standard range — submit an inquiry and our team will get back to you with a custom quote. (Inquiry form coming soon.)
checkoutPage.checkoutNote: Full checkout + cart is being set up. The order summary above reflects your current selection.

success.title: Order placed!
success.message: Thank you — we've emailed your confirmation. Your order is now being processed.
